siteConfig.heroTitle: Exquisite Catering for Your Finest Moments
siteConfig.heroSubtitle: Crafting unforgettable culinary experiences with locally sourced ingredients and artistic presentation.
siteConfig.aboutText: With over 15 years of culinary expertise, Foodgrooveng has established itself as the premier catering service for weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings. Our mission is to transform your vision into an exceptional gastronomic journey that delights all senses.

hero.title: Our Story & Legacy
hero.subtitle: Crafting unforgettable memories through the art of gastronomy since 2010.
hero.content: Crafting unforgettable memories through the art of gastronomy since 2010.

story.title: A Tradition of Taste
story.content:
Founded in 2010 by Chef Nancy, Foodgrooveng started as a passion project in a sun-drenched Brooklyn kitchen. Elena's vision was simple: to bring the warmth and complexity of her Italian heritage to the modern table, using only the freshest seasonal ingredients.

What began as a boutique catering service quickly evolved into a destination for food enthusiasts. Today, we continue that legacy, blending traditional recipes with contemporary culinary techniques to surprise and delight our guests.
